title: Product Marketing Manager (m/f/d)
core_responsibilities: Develop and optimise strategies to enhance food value chain
Leverage customer insights for product marketing initiatives
Work closely with operations and commercial teams
Strategically plan and manage budgets for campaigns
recommended_emphasis: Lead with Agile project management credentials (Scrum, SAFe)
Surface any food/FMCG proximity from ECE Group market research experience
Quantify budget and partner-management exposure (HSBC 8M budget ownership)
Clarify German proficiency progression toward fluency
